annotation.reason: Added a new § 'Graphical review surface — chrome-free rendering + threaded comments + screenshot capture' covering all five concerns the comment raised: (1) /frontend-design pass is required before Phase 9/10 implementation (mockup-first per the v0.17/v0.18 pattern); (2) chrome-free iframe rendering for HTML mockups + chrome-free for images; (3) spatial comments anchor to coordinate / DOM selector / SVG element; (4) threaded replies via a new replyTo field on the comment annotation; (5) screenshot capture via browser-side getDisplayMedia()/DOM-to-canvas + selection-rectangle UI, stored at /scrapbook/screenshots/, attached to comments or replies via a new attachments[] field. The annotation schema extension is cross-cutting (markdown review benefits from threads + screenshot attachments too) — addressed in a dedicated subsection. New Phase 7 (annotation model extension), Phase 8 (/frontend-design pass — design only), Phase 9 (HTML review surface implementation), Phase 10 (image review surface) all land in the Tasks section.
